decisions_recorded.summary: Beast/GitHub EntrepreneurOS is canonical; /opt/OS/saas deleted at e3bd216e
Clerk is target auth for all Trinity apps; EOS already migrated; CreatorOS and LyfeOS require migration from Passport.js/Firebase
transports/api/http is UMH platform API infrastructure, not EOS app source
Feature builds blocked until Phase 14.2 canonical source decisions promoted

verification.method: artifact file creation with operator-supplied decision content
